somali.voice_pack_msg_switched: Loo beddelay "{name}". Codkan hadda waa firfircoon yahay.
somali.voice_pack_msg_new: Xirmo cusub la abuuray. Magac u bixi, dooro "Macallin" ama "Arday", ka dibna duubo.
somali.voice_pack_msg_keep_one: Hayso ugu yaraan hal xirmo. Tirtir codad gaar ah adigoo isticmaalaya 🗑️.
somali.voice_pack_confirm_delete: Tirtir xirmada "{name}"? Duubitaankeeda iyo diiwaanka horumarka way lumi doonaan.
somali.voice_pack_msg_consent_first: Xaqiiji oggolaanshaha hoose ka hor inta aadan duubin codka ardayga.
somali.voice_pack_msg_need_mic: 🎙️ Duubitaanku wuxuu u baahan yahay maykarafoonka abka. Ku fur Canvas.
somali.voice_pack_msg_recording: ● Waxaa la duubayaa {what}. Mar kale taabo si aad u joojiso.
somali.voice_pack_msg_recorded: ✓ {what} waa la duubay. Taabo 🔊 si aad u dhageysato, ka dibna "Kaydi oo isticmaal".
somali.voice_pack_msg_recorded_sound: ✓ /{key}/ waa la duubay. Taabo 🔊 si aad u dhageysato, ka dibna "Kaydi oo isticmaal".
somali.voice_pack_msg_no_default_preview: Ma jiro duubitaan caadi ah oo loo dhageysto kan.
somali.voice_pack_msg_no_model: Ma jiro duubitaan tusaale ah oo /{key}/ ku jira codka caadiga ah. Duubo sida aad u malaynayso inuu u dhawaaqayo, ama eeg jadwalka tixraaca.
somali.voice_pack_msg_listen_compare: 🔁 Dhageyso: tusaalaha marka hore, ka dibna /{lbl}/ kaaga.
somali.voice_pack_msg_record_all: Marka hore duubo dhammaan codadka ku jira "{word}".
somali.voice_pack_msg_built: 🎉 Waxaad ka dhistay "{word}" codadkaaga gaarka ah!
somali.voice_pack_msg_saved: ✅ La kaydiyay oo hadda firfircoon ({count} cod{extra}). Word Sounds wuxuu isticmaali doonaa codkan.
somali.voice_pack_msg_saved_session: Firfircoon fadhigan ({count} cod), laakiin xirmada way ka weynayd kaydka biraawsarka. Isticmaal "Dhoofi" si aad ugu kaydiso fayl ahaan.
somali.voice_pack_msg_exported_student: ⬇️ "{name}" la dhoofiyay (cod arday oo sir ah).
somali.voice_pack_msg_imported: 📥 Loo soo dejiyay xirmo cusub ({count} cod). Taabo "Kaydi oo isticmaal" si aad u dabaqdo.
somali.voice_pack_title: Xirmada Cod: duubo codadkaaga gaarka ah
somali.voice_pack_clean_title: Wuxuu gooyaa aamusnaanta wuxuuna siman dhigaa heerka codka duubitaan kasta ka dib, si loo helo isku-dar wanaagsan
somali.voice_pack_aicheck_title: Tababare: wuxuu qiimeeyaa qaybkasta marka loo eego codka bartilmaameedka (wuxuu u diraa Gemini)
somali.voice_pack_aicheck_needs_canvas: Tababaraha AI wuxuu u baahan yahay Canvas
somali.voice_pack_aicheck_note: Qayb kasta waxaa loo diraa Gemini si loo falanqeeyo.
somali.voice_pack_intro_student: Ardaygu wuxuu cod kasta ku duubaa codkiisa gaarka ah (wuu u fiican yahay dareenka lahaanshaha iyo tababarka ku dhawaaqida). Taabo 👂 si aad u maqasho tusaalaha marka hore, ka dibna 🎙️ si aad u duubto. Codka ardaygu waa diiwaan sir ah: wuxuu ku haraa qalabkan, "Dhoofi"-na wuxuu abuuraa fayl SIR ah oo aad maamusho.
somali.voice_pack_intro: Cod kasta ku duubo codkaaga gaarka ah: taabo 👂 si aad u maqasho tusaalaha, ka dibna 🎙️ oo si gaaban u dhaha codka ("/p/", ma aha "ba"). Abku wuxuu ciyaaraa codkaaga inta lagu jiro isku-darka, kala-soocida iyo kaarka barroosinka. Codadka madhan waxay hayaan codka caadiga ah.
somali.voice_pack_consent_body: Duubitaanka codka ardaygu waa diiwaan sir ah oo u eg bayoometik. Wuxuu ku haraa qalabkan, qalabkani waligii ma soo geliyo (hubinta AI, haddii aad shido, waa wax keliya oo qayb dibadda u dira), waadna tirtiri kartaa wakhti kasta. Xaqiiji inaad haysato ogolaanshaha aad ku duubto ardaygan.
somali.voice_pack_progress_empty: Duubo codad (adigoo isticmaalaya is-qiimaynta 😀 / 🤔, ama Tababaraha AI 🎯 oo shidan) si aad halkan uga dhisto diiwaan tababar. Duubitaan kasta waa la diiwaan geliyaa si aad u aragto cod soo hagaagaya muddo ka dib.
somali.voice_pack_progress_legend: Diiwaan tababar, ma aha imtixaan: dhibic kasta waa hal duubitaan, laga bilaabo kii ugu da'da weynaa ilaa kii ugu cusub. Cagaar = si sax ah ayuu u dhawaaqay (ardayga ama Tababaraha AI), jaalle-casaan = sii wad tababarka, midabka cawlan = weli lama qiimayn.
somali.voice_pack_words_ready: Taabo eray si aad u maqasho isagoo laga dhisay codadkAAGA.
somali.voice_pack_words_hint: Duubo codadka ku jira eray, ka dibna taabo si aad u maqasho erayga oo dhan codkaaga gaarka ah.
somali.voice_pack_self_good: Waxaan u malaynayaa in {label} si sax ah u dhawaaqayo
somali.voice_pack_self_retry: Waxaan rabaa inaan {label} mar kale isku dayo
somali.voice_pack_cheers_intro: Duubo ammaan codkaaga (ama kan waalid). Abku wuu ciyaaraa marka ardaygu si sax ah u jawaabo, sida xoojin shaqsiyeysan. Taabo 👂 si aad u maqasho caadiga marka hore.
somali.voice_pack_instr_intro: Duubo tilmaamaha hawsha codkaaga gaarka ah, si cad oo aan degdeg ahayn. Kuwa madhan waxay hayaan sheekada caadiga ah. Taabo 👂 si aad u maqasho caadiga marka hore.

amharic.voice_pack_msg_switched: ወደ "{name}" ተቀይሯል። ይህ ድምፅ አሁን ንቁ ነው።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_new: አዲስ ጥቅል ተፈጥሯል። ስም ስጡት፣ "መምህር" ወይም "ተማሪ" ይምረጡ፣ ከዚያ ይቅዱ።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_keep_one: ቢያንስ አንድ ጥቅል ያቆዩ። ነጠላ ድምፆችን በ🗑️ ይሰርዙ።
amharic.voice_pack_confirm_delete: ጥቅል "{name}" ይሰረዝ? ቅጂዎቹና የእድገት መዝገቡ ይጠፋሉ።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_consent_first: የተማሪን ድምፅ ከመቅዳትዎ በፊት ከታች ያለውን ፈቃድ ያረጋግጡ።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_need_mic: 🎙️ ቅጂ የመተግበሪያውን ማይክሮፎን ይፈልጋል። በ Canvas ውስጥ ይክፈቱት።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_no_model: በነባሪው ድምፅ ለ /{key}/ የሞዴል ቅጂ የለም። እንደሚሰማዎት አድርገው ይቅዱ፣ ወይም የማመሳከሪያ ሰንጠረዥ ይመልከቱ።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_record_all: መጀመሪያ በ "{word}" ውስጥ ያሉትን ሁሉንም ድምፆች ይቅዱ።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_saved: ✅ ተቀምጧል አሁንም ንቁ ነው ({count} ድምፆች{extra})። Word Sounds ይህን ድምፅ ይጠቀማል።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_saved_session: ለዚህ ክፍለ ጊዜ ንቁ ({count} ድምፆች)፣ ግን ጥቅሉ ለአሳሹ ማከማቻ በጣም ትልቅ ነበር። እንደ ፋይል ለማስቀመጥ "ላክ" ይጠቀሙ።
amharic.voice_pack_msg_imported: 📥 እንደ አዲስ ጥቅል ገብቷል ({count} ድምፆች)። ለመተግበር "አስቀምጥና ተጠቀም" ይንኩ።
amharic.voice_pack_clean_title: ከእያንዳንዱ ቅጂ በኋላ ዝምታን ይቆርጣል ድምፁንም ያስተካክላል፣ ለተሻለ ውህደት
amharic.voice_pack_aicheck_title: አሰልጣኝ፦ እያንዳንዱን ክሊፕ ከዒላማው ድምፅ ጋር ያወዳድራል (ወደ Gemini ይልካል)
amharic.voice_pack_aicheck_note: እያንዳንዱ ክሊፕ ለመተንተን ወደ Gemini ይላካል።
amharic.voice_pack_intro_student: ተማሪው እያንዳንዱን ድምፅ በራሱ ድምፅ ይቀዳል (ለባለቤትነት ስሜትና ለአነጋገር ልምምድ ጥሩ ነው)። መጀመሪያ ሞዴሉን ለማዳመጥ 👂 ይንኩ፣ ከዚያ ለመቅዳት 🎙️። የተማሪ ድምፅ ሚስጥራዊ መዝገብ ነው፦ በዚህ መሣሪያ ላይ ይቆያል፣ "ላክ"ም እርስዎ የሚቆጣጠሩትን ሚስጥራዊ ፋይል ይፈጥራል።
amharic.voice_pack_intro: እያንዳንዱን ድምፅ በራስዎ ድምፅ ይቅዱ፦ ሞዴሉን ለማዳመጥ 👂 ይንኩ፣ ከዚያ 🎙️ ድምፁንም በአጭሩ ይናገሩ ("/p/"፣ "ፐ" አይደለም)። መተግበሪያው በማዋሃድ፣ በማግለልና በመልሕቅ ካርድ ጊዜ ድምፅዎን ያጫውታል። ባዶ ድምፆች ነባሪውን ድምፅ ይይዛሉ።
amharic.voice_pack_consent_body: የተማሪ ድምፅ ቅጂ ሚስጥራዊ፣ ባዮሜትሪክ-መሰል መዝገብ ነው። በዚህ መሣሪያ ላይ ይቆያል፣ ይህ መሣሪያ ፈጽሞ አይሰቅለውም (የ AI ምርመራ፣ ካበሩት፣ ክሊፕ ወደ ውጭ የሚልክ ብቸኛው ነገር ነው)፣ በማንኛውም ጊዜም ሊሰርዙት ይችላሉ። ይህን ተማሪ ለመቅዳት ፈቃድ እንዳለዎት ያረጋግጡ።
amharic.voice_pack_progress_empty: ድምፆችን ይቅዱ (በራስ-ግምገማ 😀 / 🤔፣ ወይም የ AI አሰልጣኝ 🎯 በርቶ) እዚህ የልምምድ መዝገብ ለመገንባት። እያንዳንዱ ቅጂ ይመዘገባል ስለዚህ አንድ ድምፅ ከጊዜ ጋር ሲሻሻል ማየት ይችላሉ።
amharic.voice_pack_progress_legend: የልምምድ መዝገብ ነው፣ ፈተና አይደለም፦ እያንዳንዱ ነጥብ አንድ ቅጂ ነው፣ ከአሮጌው ወደ አዲሱ። አረንጓዴ = ትክክል ተሰማ (ተማሪ ወይም የ AI አሰልጣኝ)፣ ብርቱካናማ = ልምምድ ይቀጥሉ፣ ግራጫ = ገና አልተገመገመም።
amharic.voice_pack_words_ready: አንድ ቃል ይንኩ ከእርስዎ ድምፆች ተሠርቶ ለማዳመጥ።
amharic.voice_pack_words_hint: በአንድ ቃል ውስጥ ያሉትን ድምፆች ይቅዱ፣ ከዚያ ሙሉ ቃሉን በራስዎ ድምፅ ለማዳመጥ ይንኩት።
amharic.voice_pack_cheers_intro: ምስጋናን በድምፅዎ (ወይም በወላጅ ድምፅ) ይቅዱ። ተማሪው በትክክል ሲመልስ መተግበሪያው እንደ ግላዊ ማበረታቻ ያጫውተዋል። መጀመሪያ ነባሪውን ለማዳመጥ 👂 ይንኩ።
amharic.voice_pack_instr_intro: የተግባር መመሪያዎችን በራስዎ ድምፅ፣ በግልጽና ሳይቸኩሉ ይቅዱ። ባዶዎቹ ነባሪውን ትረካ ይይዛሉ። መጀመሪያ ነባሪውን ለማዳመጥ 👂 ይንኩ።

kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_switched: Byahinduwe kuri "{name}". Iri jwi ubu rirakora.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_new: Pake nshya yaremwe. Wiyite izina, hitamo "Umwarimu" cyangwa "Umunyeshuri", hanyuma wandike.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_keep_one: Bika nibura pake imwe. Siba amajwi imwe imwe ukoresheje 🗑️.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_confirm_delete: Gusiba pake "{name}"? Amajwi yayo n'inyandiko y'iterambere bizabura.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_consent_first: Emeza uburenganzira hepfo mbere yo kwandika ijwi ry'umunyeshuri.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_need_mic: 🎙️ Kwandika bisaba mikoro ya porogaramu. Yifungure muri Canvas.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_recording: ● Birandika {what}. Kanda nanone kugira ngo uhagarike.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_recorded: ✓ {what} byanditswe. Kanda 🔊 kugira ngo umve, hanyuma "Bika ukoreshe".
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_recorded_sound: ✓ /{key}/ byanditswe. Kanda 🔊 kugira ngo umve, hanyuma "Bika ukoreshe".
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_no_default_preview: Nta majwi asanzwe yo kumva kuri iki.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_no_model: Nta ijwi ry'urugero rya /{key}/ mu ijwi risanzwe. Andika uko utekereza ko rivuga, cyangwa reba imbonerahamwe y'icyitegererezo.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_record_all: Banza wandike amajwi yose ari muri "{word}".
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_saved: ✅ Byabitswe kandi birakora ubu ({count} amajwi{extra}). Word Sounds izakoresha iri jwi.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_saved_session: Birakora kuri iri shami ({count} amajwi), ariko pake yari nini cyane ku bubiko bwa mushakisha. Koresha "Kohereza" kugira ngo uyibike nka dosiye.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_msg_imported: 📥 Byatumijwe nka pake nshya ({count} amajwi). Kanda "Bika ukoreshe" kugira ngo ubikoreshe.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_dialog_label: Muhinduzi wa Pake y'Ijwi rya Fonime
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_title: Pake y'Ijwi: andika amajwi yawe bwite
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_clean_title: Iceceka ubusa kandi inganya urwego rw'ijwi nyuma ya buri kwandika, kugira ngo bivange neza
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_aicheck_title: Umutoza: asuzuma buri gice ugereranyije n'ijwi rigamijwe (arikohereza kuri Gemini)
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_aicheck_note: Buri gice koherezwa kuri Gemini kugira ngo gisesengurwe.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_intro_student: Umunyeshuri yandika buri jwi mu ijwi rye bwite (ni byiza ku gitekerezo cyo kwiyumvamo n'imyitozo yo kuvuga). Kanda 👂 kugira ngo wumve urugero mbere, hanyuma 🎙️ kugira ngo wandike. Ijwi ry'umunyeshuri ni inyandiko ibanga: riguma kuri iki gikoresho, kandi "Kohereza" rikora dosiye IBANGA ugenzura.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_intro: Andika buri jwi mu ijwi ryawe bwite: kanda 👂 kugira ngo wumve urugero, hanyuma 🎙️ uvuge ijwi mu magambo make ("/p/", si "pe"). Porogaramu icuranga ijwi ryawe mu gihe cyo kuvanga, gutandukanya n'ikarita y'ifatizo. Amajwi arimo ubusa abika ijwi risanzwe.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_consent_body: Kwandika ijwi ry'umunyeshuri ni inyandiko ibanga ifite imiterere isa na bayometiriki. Riguma kuri iki gikoresho, iki gikoresho ntirishyira kuri interineti na rimwe (igenzura rya AI, niba uricyemuye, ni cyo kintu kimwe gusa cyohereza igice hanze), kandi ushobora kurisiba igihe icyo ari cyo cyose. Emeza ko ufite uruhushya rwo kwandika uyu munyeshuri.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_progress_empty: Andika amajwi (ukoresheje isuzuma ryawe 😀 / 🤔, cyangwa Umutoza wa AI 🎯 ufunguye) kugira ngo wubake inyandiko y'imyitozo hano. Buri kwandika kwandikwa kugira ngo ubone ijwi ritera imbere uko igihe gihita.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_progress_legend: Inyandiko y'imyitozo, si ikizamini: buri kadomo ni ukwandika kumwe, kuva ku kera kugeza ku gishya. Icyatsi = byumvikanye neza (umunyeshuri cyangwa Umutoza wa AI), umuhondo-utukura = komeza kwitoza, ikijuju = ntiraza gusuzumwa.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_words_ready: Kanda ijambo kugira ngo uryumve ryubatswe mu majwi YAWE.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_words_hint: Andika amajwi ari mu ijambo, hanyuma urikande kugira ngo wumve ijambo ryose mu ijwi ryawe bwite.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_cheers_intro: Andika ishimwe mu ijwi ryawe (cyangwa iry'umubyeyi). Porogaramu iricuranga iyo umunyeshuri asubije neza, nk'ikomezabumwe ryihariye. Kanda 👂 kugira ngo wumve irisanzwe mbere.
kinyarwanda.voice_pack_instr_intro: Andika amabwiriza y'umurimo mu ijwi ryawe bwite, mu buryo busobanutse kandi udatebya. Ayarimo ubusa abika inkuru isanzwe. Kanda 👂 kugira ngo wumve irisanzwe mbere.

luganda.voice_pack_msg_switched: Kikyusiddwa ku "{name}". Eddoboozi lino kati likola.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_new: Pakeegi empya ekoleddwa. Giwe erinnya, londa "Omusomesa" oba "Omuyizi", oluvannyuma okwate.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_keep_one: Kuuma waakiri pakeegi emu. Sazaamu amaloboozi kinnoomu ng'okozesa 🗑️.
luganda.voice_pack_confirm_delete: Sazaamu pakeegi "{name}"? Okukwata kwayo n'olukalala lw'enkulaakulana bijja kubula.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_consent_first: Kakasa olukusa wansi nga tonnaba kukwata ddoboozi ly'omuyizi.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_need_mic: 🎙️ Okukwata kwetaaga maykolofoni ya app. Gigggule mu Canvas.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_recorded: ✓ {what} kikwatiddwa. Kwata 🔊 okuwuliriza, oluvannyuma "Tereka era okozese".
luganda.voice_pack_msg_recorded_sound: ✓ /{key}/ kikwatiddwa. Kwata 🔊 okuwuliriza, oluvannyuma "Tereka era okozese".
luganda.voice_pack_msg_no_default_preview: Tewali kukwata kwa bulijjo kw'okuwuliriza ku kino.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_no_model: Tewali kukwata kwa kyokulabirako ku /{key}/ mu ddoboozi erya bulijjo. Kwata nga bw'olowooza nti liwulikika, oba laba etteeka ery'okukozesa.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_record_all: Sooka okwate amaloboozi gonna agali mu "{word}".
luganda.voice_pack_msg_saved: ✅ Kitereddwa era kikola kati ({count} amaloboozi{extra}). Word Sounds ejja kukozesa eddoboozi lino.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_saved_session: Kikola ku ssaawa eno ({count} amaloboozi), naye pakeegi yali nnene nnyo ku tterekero lya browza. Kozesa "Fulumya" okugitereka nga fayiro.
luganda.voice_pack_msg_not_pack: Fayiro eyo si pakeegi ya maloboozi (fonemu).
luganda.voice_pack_msg_imported: 📥 Eyingiziddwa nga pakeegi empya ({count} amaloboozi). Kwata "Tereka era okozese" okugikozesa.
luganda.voice_pack_dialog_label: Omutereeza wa Pakeegi y'Eddoboozi lya Fonemu
luganda.voice_pack_title: Pakeegi y'Eddoboozi: kwata amaloboozi go ggwe
luganda.voice_pack_clean_title: Esala akasiriikiriro era enkanya omuwendo gw'eddoboozi oluvannyuma lwa buli kukwata, okusobola okutabula obulungi
luganda.voice_pack_aicheck_title: Omutendesi: apima buli kalip ng'agigeraageranya n'eddoboozi erigendereddwa (aliweereza ku Gemini)
luganda.voice_pack_aicheck_note: Buli kalip kiweerezebwa ku Gemini okukola okwekenneenya.
luganda.voice_pack_intro_student: Omuyizi akwata buli ddoboozi mu ddoboozi lye ye (kirungi ku kuwulira nti wa nannyini n'okugezesa okwogera). Kwata 👂 okuwuliriza ekyokulabirako olubereberye, oluvannyuma 🎙️ okukwata. Eddoboozi ly'omuyizi kyakwekwetebwa: lisigala ku kyuma kino, era "Fulumya" ekola fayiro EYAKYAMA gy'olondoola.
luganda.voice_pack_intro: Kwata buli ddoboozi mu ddoboozi lyo ggwe: kwata 👂 okuwuliriza ekyokulabirako, oluvannyuma 🎙️ era yogera eddoboozi mu bumpi ("/p/", si "pe"). App ezannya eddoboozi lyo nga etabula, egaba n'akakaadi k'essako. Amaloboozi amalala agakalu gakuuma eddoboozi erya bulijjo.
luganda.voice_pack_consent_body: Okukwata eddoboozi ly'omuyizi kyakwekwetebwa, ekifaanana nga ekya bayoometiriki. Lisigala ku kyuma kino, ekikozesebwa kino tekirisindika ku yintaneeti n'akamu (okukebera kwa AI, bw'okikola, kye kintu kyokka ekisindika akalip ebweru), era oyinza okulisazaamu ekiseera kyonna. Kakasa nti olina olukusa okukwata omuyizi ono.
luganda.voice_pack_progress_empty: Kwata amaloboozi (n'okwepima 😀 / 🤔, oba Omutendesi wa AI 🎯 ng'akoleddwa) okuzimba olukalala lw'okugezesa wano. Buli kukwata kuwandiikibwa osobole okulaba eddoboozi nga lyeyongera obulungi ng'ekiseera kigenda.
luganda.voice_pack_progress_legend: Olukalala lw'okugezesa, si kibuuzo: buli kasonga ke kukwata kumu, okuva ku kya kale okutuuka ku kiggya. Kya kiragala = lyawulikidde bulungi (omuyizi oba Omutendesi wa AI), kya kyenvu-kimyufu = weeyongere okugezesa, kya ffumbe = tekinnaba kupimibwa.
luganda.voice_pack_words_ready: Kwata ekigambo okukiwuliriza nga kizimbiddwa okuva mu maloboozi GO.
luganda.voice_pack_words_hint: Kwata amaloboozi agali mu kigambo, oluvannyuma okikwate okuwuliriza ekigambo kyonna mu ddoboozi lyo ggwe.
luganda.voice_pack_cheers_intro: Kwata okutendereza mu ddoboozi lyo (oba ery'omuzadde). App ezannya nga omuyizi addamu obulungi, ng'okuzzaamu amaanyi okw'obuntu. Kwata 👂 okuwuliriza erya bulijjo olubereberye.
luganda.voice_pack_instr_intro: Kwata ebiragiro by'omulimu mu ddoboozi lyo ggwe, mu bweyolefu era nga tewanguyiriza. Ebikalu gakuuma okwogera okwa bulijjo. Kwata 👂 okuwuliriza erya bulijjo olubereberye.
